tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Hey this is my first tab! I really like this song and I made up my own 
strumming pattern simply pick the first string and then strum down and repeat 
this twice for every chord. The top string for G is the first string. The 
top string for C is the second string. The top string for D is the 3rd
string. I only do this during the verses and strum with the rhythm during 
the choruses. I don't use a capo with this. Good luck =) 


 Oh! Ohhhh yeeeh

I used to think maybe you loved me now baby I'm sure[/tab]

And I just cant wait till the day when you knock on my door[/tab]
